Wee Harvester  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: 20
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +1 STA: +1 WIS: +3
Effect: Summon Food (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: DRU
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Wee Harvester
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: 20
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 45
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 155
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +1 STA: +1 WIS: +3
Effect: Summon Food (Any Slot, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: DRU
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Light:Flameless Lantern
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:2 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:30
Submitted By:Wiseman
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 05:29:51
Page Updated:Sun Aug 9th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 100pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Shakey's Stuffing

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Rivervale


Uploaded June 26th, 2022 by Drewinette
Send a correction

265 posts
Even though only wearable by the DRU class, any class can click this in their inventory for yummy magical bread!

QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2006 at 8:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754733270
View User Forum
1 post
This item is definately obtainable at at least lvl 12, which is what lvl I got it. I don't know why they list it as lvl 20.

BL
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2003 at 12:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787535186
Scholar
17 posts
Funny that this is listed as BeastLord equippable, when none of the races listed can be BeastLords.
▲ Page top
RE: BL
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2003 at 6:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752538177
View User Forum
186 posts
maybe that's because the picture posted here is not only pre-Luclin, but pre-velious (if you know your EQ history, you'll know that). And beastlords were added?...... With the Luclin expansion, yea! good answer!

Also, when this pic was taken, EQ didn't give any details about how a spell effect worked other than the charges. (no cast time, must be equiped, etc). Plus, they were still using the larger font which indicates a pre-Kunark pic. Come on man, this is an antiquie, where is your appreciation for such fine things.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2003 at 3:29 PM Rating: Decent
AmberEyes
3 posts
The Harvester is rewarded with only 20 charges, would have been nice if it still had unlimited casts, if it ever did.

The Flower Girl
▲ Page top
wanted shovel got belt
QuoteReply
# May 17 2002 at 8:30 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1712535405946
Sage
90 posts
The Belt had 17 charges when Shakey handed it to me. I just completed the quest last night on Cazic-Thule.

I cant confirm a Haste effect.

Some helpful quest info:

Cleet Miller (not jr) drops the hay after standing still in the fields. When he starts walking again the hay is there. The Hay is not "no drop".

Rorer is near the Rathe zone. Hail him but dont say ANYTHING. Just give him the 66 gold and hay.
The cursed hay is not "no drop"

The oil is from the second to last guy on the left in the N.Queynos palidin guild area. Say " I will deliver the flask." to get it. The oil IS NO DROP.

I had zero smithing skill so I did a shout in Nqueynos for a blacksmith and asked the guy to get the no drop oil, then I gave him the cursed hay and he did the combine right in Nqueynos.

The writhing Hay is NOT NO DROP. So he handed it back and i went to Rivervale.


<edit> Did the quest again and got the harvester... wish it was 1hb..
This time I did the Combine of the oil and cursed hay myself and was succesful with a forging skill of zero. That was a relief. Nice shovel. I wear it when taxing and hanging around EC.

Hope this helps.


Edited, Mon May 20 10:00:09 2002
▲ Page top
RE: wanted shovel got belt
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2003 at 9:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759301666
136 posts
Oddly it WAS Cleet JR who dropped the hay after I tired of following daddy.

Got the belt too, the pic is of rope so I though it was loot I obtained from the giant spiders, hehe.

Trying again for the Wee harvester. Looks like the first time is the belt then perhaps the harvester
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 23 2001 at 5:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) lol, I once made an iksar necromancer and was walking around cabalis when i found it at a merchant...A Shovel! (no not anything special just A Shovel) If im correct it was 1hb 4/24 but it looks like the wee harvester and ponz. Had it on my necro for some time hehe looks weird. But now i want one for my druid (human) who is wearing CCS, maybe if i go anon with this thing i can pretend im a mag hahaha. So for all you who want it for looks not stats, all u wars and rouges out there, make an iksar. Somewehre in cab at the tent merchants they sell Shovels for bout 4gp, not bad for the look. You can buy them as many times as u like, then give em to another one of ur chars! very fun hehe
Got yesterday, but
QuoteReply
# Oct 18 2001 at 5:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759056685
168 posts
it doesn't show the number of charges....does it only show when you first use it and it then shows 49? I can do this quest easy (tracked Roror East of entrance to Cazic, btw)...with porting, I can port to NK, run to Qeynos, picking up a hay at the Miller's farm on the way...get the Blessed Oil ("I will deliver the flask" to the guy standing next to the other guy...across from the guy who's alone on the wall by the temple...I forget his name...)...then port to Feerott, camo, and run to Roror (who was actually nice...not KOS at all..like he doesn't care...although it was kinda weird when he walked straight into a pillar and stayed there...had to wait til he made that growl he does and stuck his snout out the stone...)..and remember...+faction without -Faction is good no matter how many times you do it...and I think someone said Bankers are Beta Neutral (although who knows?)..so..maybe you'll be able to get that loan when ya need it...anyway...ported to Misty, ran to the farm.. smithed with no problem..got the Wee Harvester! but, doesn't show charges..and I know I can do this quest anytime, easily...so if I was to sell it..wouldn't want to say "well, I tested it..so it only has 49 charges..but it doesn't show that"...guess I'll hafta get a friend to stand by with this in hand next time I do the quest for the belt just in case I get another one of these..
(no need to flame, I know I ramble)
▲ Page top
shame
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 4:05 PM Rating: Default

for shame it's 2 handed, it would certainly be a more used weapon, instead of those velium etched stone maces that every druid and thier mother carries.

oh well

People love the shovel!
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2001 at 8:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1606090737819
Sage
159 posts
Of all the items that my druid character has ever worn, this item by far has drawn the most attention from group members. Everyone wants to see it and review the stats. It is a good weapon and fun to use; many golbins and Sarnaks have tasted its sharp edge!

Duladan Bloodmoon, 33rd Season Ranger, servant of Tunare, Morrell-Thule
Tollas Thunderson, 25th Season Druid, follower of the Great Rain God, Morrell-Thule

▲ Page top
Rogues (and warriors and clerics...)
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 6:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
When was the last time your rogue could cast summon food??? Or for that matter your warrior??? See how it's a good item now? Sure, it's not a Soulfire, but can you complain? Don't underestimate the value of free food, one of the biggest costs in the game if you're the wrong race/class.
▲ Page top
RE: Rogues (and warriors and clerics...)
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 6:22 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Hey, me again...

Ok, so I was wrong about clerics, they can summon their own food and drink, didn't know that at the time. btw, ANY race/class CAN click it for the effect, and it is charged now, 50 charges of summon food...

We all make mistakes, 'slick'

Before it was a charged item, though, it was very nice for food purposes
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 07 2001 at 7:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Any race Tinosaur? well the 4 druid ones, the subject is rogues warriors and clerics, none of which can use. I notice you use "blows" and "flamer" in the same sentence a Freudian slip no doubt.

it isn't a proc, it is a right click effect, it can be done from inventory by any race.
